title: cymbachne angustata var. chinensis
intro: Cymbachne angustata var. chinensis, also known as Chinese cymbachne, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chinese cymbachne include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and promoting wound healing. Chinese cymbachne can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
